title: Dragon Fire destroys all magic cards on field

card.rawText: Destroy all magic cards on the field.

plan.title: Dragon Fire destroys all magic cards on field
plan.summary: Play Dragon Fire while both players have active magic and verify every field magic is destroyed and Dragon Fire goes to cemetery.

notes: Pre-place Demonic Magic and Dragon’s Bane in active magic slots before Dragon Fire is played.
Use any legal primary creatures if required by fixture.

steps: Resolve destroy all magic cards effect.
Inspect both players' magic slots and cemeteries.
manualVerification: Confirm global scope includes both players and the resolving standard magic itself.
riskNotes: If standard magic is not considered on field during resolution, cemetery assertion may differ; engine source of truth decides timing.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
